title: Digital Marketing Specialist (m/f/d)
missing_skills: Content writing for landing pages and social media
Hands-on digital campaign creation (Google Ads, Meta Ads, etc.)
core_responsibilities: Write compelling copy for ads, landing pages, and social media to convert visitors into leads
Support creation and optimization of digital performance marketing campaigns
Conduct market and competitor research to identify trends and opportunities
Analyze marketing funnel data to understand performance and suggest improvements
Collaborate with team to develop data-driven marketing initiatives
recommended_emphasis: Funnel & conversion analysis experience to demonstrate ability to interpret marketing data and optimize funnels
Campaign performance optimisation skills — directly maps to the performance marketing requirement
A/B & multivariate testing — highlight concrete experiments run and outcomes achieved
Market segmentation & intelligence — position as competitor research and trend identification capability
E-commerce & campaign ROI analytics — frame as hands-on data-driven decision making
Marketing KPI framework design — shows strategic thinking relevant to a fast-growing startup
